description: Reshape invariant: applyCreditToInvoice leaves total_amount untouched while credit_applied, transactions, allocations, pools, and client balance update as before.
computeBalanceDue: matrix over payments × credits × partials (full credit, partial credit + partial payment, overcredit clamp) returns correct balance and drives paid/partially_applied flips.
Backfill migration round-trip: invoices with credit_applied > 0 get original totals restored on up; down re-applies the decrement; untouched rows unchanged.
Stripe payment link requests a checkout amount equal to balance due after a partial credit (existing payment-link tests extended).
Portal invoice views and pay-page render balance due, not mutated total (contract test with a credited invoice fixture).
invoice_type backfill: prepayment rows → 'prepayment', negative-total rows → 'credit_note', the rest → 'standard'; finalizing a new negative invoice sets 'credit_note'.
Credit-note numbering: sequence independent from invoices, CM- prefix applied, configurable prefix respected.
CreditMemo transform: sign-flipped line amounts, item/tax mapping reuse, internal-tax vs delegated-tax parity with the invoice transform.
CreditMemo delivery writes a CreditMemo mapping row with sync token + total snapshot; re-delivery is an idempotent sparse update.
Validation: prepayment invoice in an export selection produces the exclusion message and no document; credit note with missing item mapping fails validation like an invoice.
Producer: finalizing a credit note enqueues export_credit_memo only with connected realm + auto-sync on.
CreditMemo drift: QBO-side total change or void on a mapped memo files a drift exception via the slice-1 comparator.
apply_credit dependency gate: op stays pending (with reason) until both memo and invoice are mapped, then executes on a later cycle.
apply_credit execution: zero-dollar Payment payload links CreditMemo and Invoice with the allocation amount; allocation-keyed mapping makes re-delivery a no-op.
voidInvoice happy path: status 'cancelled', invoice_cancelled transaction written, credit applications reversed (pools + client balance restored, reversal transactions present).
voidInvoice guards: blocked with payments present; applied credit note blocked; draft excluded; permission enforced.
hardDeleteInvoice on an exported invoice is rejected with the void-directing error; unexported invoices delete as before.
void_invoice op: adapter issues the QBO void call (mocked), mapping → 'voided', badge aggregation reports Voided; voiding enqueues regardless of auto-sync setting.
Unapply on a synced allocation files an exception and does not call QBO.

DB-backed integration: credit note finalized → memo exported; applied → apply_credit delivered; invoice voided → QBO void issued; balances and mapping states consistent end-to-end (mocked QBO client).
Sandbox: finalize a credit note → CreditMemo appears in QBO with correct lines/tax; apply it in Alga → QBO invoice balance and customer balance match Alga.
Sandbox: void an exported invoice with a reason → QBO shows the invoice voided; badge shows Voided; books agree.
Sandbox + portal: after a partial credit, the portal shows balance due and the Stripe checkout charges exactly that.
Regression: pre-slice-2 invoices (backfilled totals) display correct amounts in MSP UI, portal, and PDFs.
